title: Session complete: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) — session ending per owner direction; no work remains; no claim disposition (no retained claims); supersedes prior 20:29:52Z 'preparation' closeout
body:
Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) session-complete broadcast per owner direction *"it's going to be a while before the follow on plan is ready, so please run a session handoff in preparation for this session to be over"*.

## Boundary owned (final)

CLI bootstrap extraction (post-compaction-3 → bundle land → portability stub-cure → post-merge prep).

## Outcome (final)

- **LANDED**: CLI bootstrap bundle in Mistbound's M1-Pause single-commit `340752bb` (6 files; PR-108 merged at `2462952a`; release 1.11.0 cut at `bf3a8152`).
- **LANDED**: Portability validation cure (orphan empty `.claude/skills/chatgpt-report-normalisation/` directory removed; architectural cure over schema widening; portability now passes 19/77/22/79/77/77).

## Claims / queue / git state (final)

- 0 active claims under `8d8d93` (`a8aabbc7` closed at 14:55:14Z post-bundle-land via canonical CLI).
- 0 commit-queue intents under `8d8d93`.
- 0 open comms obligations from my seat.
- Branch `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs` at HEAD `bf3a8152` (release 1.11.0); 0 ahead of `origin/main`.

## Session complete announcement

YES — Twilit Scattering Twilight session `8d8d93` closing per owner direction. No further work expected on this session. Watcher `bfsekviid` dies naturally at session end. Heartbeat cron `d98a7394` stopping via CronDelete (final-heartbeat-end paired with this broadcast).

## Retained claims + handoff reasons

NONE — no retention. If post-merge tidy plan re-routes Cycle 3 (audit-shaped test deletion at `commit-workflow.unit.test.ts:221-247`, pre-routed by Director ACK `45f4-a9a9` 14:51:31Z) to a new Twilit identity, the successor opens a fresh claim on identity registration.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

NO — clean boundary. Continuity context lives in:

- Prior team-member closeout broadcast (this session at 20:29:52Z) — boundary-scoped synthesis end-to-end
- Marshal handoff record `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-4.md` — failure-mode acknowledgement substrate
- Commit body of `340752bb` — full reviewer attribution + Important findings absorbed + 1 deferred (adapter integration coverage)

A successor under the agentic-engineering-enhancements thread reads the prior closeout broadcast end-to-end before any move.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

YES — final heartbeat-end paired with this broadcast (separate event), naming cron `d98a7394` stop.

## Surprise or changed understanding (final captures, already in prior closeout)

Three items captured in the 20:29:52Z closeout — directive-interpretation hazard under stall pressure; marshal-seat watcher silent-failure cure-shapes; architectural-cure-over-schema-widening principle. No additions in this idle window.

## Blockers or risks

NONE at my seat.

## Handoff needed

NO — Director Seaworthy holds team closeout authority; my boundary is settled.

## Tag

`behaviour-note` — final-team-member-closeout + session-complete + clean-boundary + no-retained-claims + watcher-dies-with-session.

— Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `8d8d93` (Implementor, session-end)
